title: one-to-many relationship
text: one-to-many relationship A relationship between two entities (for example, X and Y), where more than one occurrence of Y can exist for each occurrence of X, and only one occurrence of X exists for all related occurrences of Y. Related Links Relationships A relationship is an association between one entity and another. It is modeled as a development object belonging to the many-side entity in a one-to-many relationship.
